titles.title: Come now is the time to worship

authors.author: Brian Doerksen
Brian Doerksen
Komm, jetzt ist die Zeit, wir beten an

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, now is the time to worship Come, now is the time to give your heart Come, just as you are to worship Come, just as you are before your God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One day ev'ry tongue will confess You are God One day ev'ry knee will bow Still the greatest treasure remains for those Who gladly choose you now
